mechanism_narrative: A persistent decline in the federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate, directly lifting equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 5.0 percent, tight labor market conditions accelerate wage growth and consumer spending, driving corporate earnings upward and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day forward returns in more than 55% of instances where UNRATE drops below 5.0, or the signal shows no predictive power in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production and housing starts signals broad-based economic expansion, which boosts corporate revenue expectations and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a random baseline in out-of-sample testing, or the combined proxy correlation with forward returns drops below 0.10 over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of rising interest rates, an increase in real retail sales indicates resilient consumer demand that offsets higher borrowing costs, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns turn negative in more than 60% of triggered instances, or RSAFS growth shows no positive correlation with equity returns during rate-hiking periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sequential increase in real GDP growth signals strengthening aggregate demand, which expands corporate profit margins and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns show no statistical difference from zero when GDPC1 growth accelerates, or the signal's predictive rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the industrial production index declines below 98.0, supply chain constraints or weak manufacturing activity signal economic headwinds, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in more than 50% of triggered instances, or the signal fails to predict downward price movements in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising employment levels combined with stable inflation indicate a healthy labor market without overheating, which supports sustained corporate earnings growth and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in more than 55% of observations, or the interaction term shows no statistical significance in a multivariate regression over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: In a low-unemployment environment, a sharp drop in housing starts signals a cooling consumer sector that reduces corporate revenue forecasts, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns do not decline when HOUST falls sharply during low-unemployment periods, or the signal's out-of-sample accuracy drops below 50% over a 2-year rolling window.
